individuals_intro: Our programmes are designed for aspiring entrepreneurs who are ready to move from thinking about starting a business to actually building one. Every programme covers the critical path to first revenue: Mindset, Offers, Sales, Marketing, and Operations.
organisations_intro: We partner with universities, local authorities, government agencies, and corporate organisations to deliver structured entrepreneurship training and workforce development programmes.
organisations_desc: Mind and Method Academy delivers bespoke business education programmes designed to meet institutional objectives. Whether you are a university seeking to improve graduate employability, a council delivering economic development priorities, or a corporate partner investing in workforce entrepreneurship — we design and deliver programmes that produce measurable outcomes.
